input.background: A study of vector control in an African village found that the mean sprayable surface area was 249 square feet with standard deviation 39.82 square feet in a simple random sample of n=100 homes.
input.question: Calculate a 95% confidence interval for μ.

output.answer: SE = 39.82 / sqrt(100) = 3.982; t_{100-1,1-(.05/2)} = t_{99, .975} = 1.984 (via www.cytel.com/Products/StaTable/). If a computer program is not available, you can make use of the fact that t_{99, .975} ≈ t_{100, .975} = 1.984. 95% CI for μ = 249 ± (1.984)(3.982) = 249 ± 7.9 = (241.1 to 256.9) square feet.

meta_info.caption: Vector control in an African village
